mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_chunks WHERE source_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT * FROM knowledge_chunks WHERE source_title = #{sourceTitle} AND source_type = #{sourceType} ORDER BY chunk_index

SELECT source_type, source_title, source_id, COUNT(*) as chunk_count, GROUP_CONCAT(vector_id) as vector_ids FROM knowledge_chunks GROUP BY source_type, source_title, source_id ORDER BY MAX(created_at) DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_chunks (content, source_title, source_type, source_id, category, software, chunk_index, vector_id, created_at) VALUES (#{content}, #{sourceTitle}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{category}, #{software}, #{chunkIndex}, #{vectorId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM knowledge_chunks WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND source_type = #{sourceType}
DELETE FROM knowledge_chunks WHERE source_title = #{sourceTitle} AND source_type = #{sourceType}
DELETE FROM knowledge_chunks WHERE source_title LIKE #{pattern}
